steps.title: Calculate the charge state of each...
steps.instruction: Calculate the charge state of each multiply charged peaks based on the spacing between the isotopic peaks.

steps.title: Calculate the exact mass based on...
steps.instruction: Calculate the exact mass based on the m/z and charge state.

steps.title: Obtain CID data from each sample

steps.title: Assign peaks by matching the exact...
steps.instruction: Assign peaks by matching the exact mass and the CID spectrum to the protein databank. http://prospector.ucsf.edu/prospector/cgi-bin/msform.cgi?form=msproduct
